items.mistake: Maintaining a hand-written 'selected features' list separate from the training artifact
items.fix: Export `pipeline.named_steps['select'].get_support()` or deploy the full fitted Pipeline; regenerate lists from the artifact on each release.
items.why: Manual lists fall out of sync when retraining changes the mask, silently breaking online scoring.
items.example: After retrain, `joblib.load('model.pkl').named_steps['select'].get_support()` must match the feature store column set.

items.mistake: Tuning SelectKBest k or RFECV settings using the final test set
items.fix: Reserve test for one final evaluation; tune k with inner CV on train or a dedicated validation split.
items.why: Test-informed subset choice leaks labels into feature selection and overstates production performance.
items.example: Use `GridSearchCV(pipe, param_grid={'select__k': [10, 20, 40]}, cv=5)` on train only, then evaluate once on test.

items.mistake: Running selection before train/test split on the full labeled dataframe
items.fix: Split first; nest selector inside `Pipeline` so each fold's selector sees only its training partition.
items.why: Global MI or chi-square scores computed with test labels contaminate which columns survive.
items.example: Replace `sel.fit(X, y); X_train = sel.transform(X_train)` with `pipe.fit(X_train, y_train)` where sel is a pipeline step.
